Retour aux réunions
Réunion du CIML2017October 10, 2017

🇨🇴 Carthagène des Indes, Colombie

52nd CIML Meeting — Resolutions (EN)

DOI de la réunion10.63493/meetings/ciml52
URN de la réunionurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-52

Ordre du jour

PointTitreRésultat
aCartagena de Indias, ColombiaDiscuté
b10–12 October 2017Discuté
cOpening speeches – Roll call – Approval of the agendaAdopté
1Approval by the CIML of the minutes of the 51st CIML MeetingDiscuté
2General report by the CIML PresidentDiscuté
3Presentation by the candidate for CIML PresidentDiscuté
4Recruitment of the new BIML Assistant DirectorDiscuté
4.1Report by the Selection Committee ChairpersonDiscuté
4.2Presentation by the selected candidateDiscuté
4.3Discussion by the CIMLDiscuté
5Establishment of the Selection Committee for the recruitment of the next BIML DirectorDiscuté
6Discussion on the renewal of the contract of Mr. Ian Dunmill, BIML Assistant DirectorDiscuté
7Report by the BIML Director on BIML activitiesDiscuté
8Report by the BIML Director on Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscuté
9Financial mattersDiscuté
9.1Approval by the CIML of the 2016 accountsDiscuté
9.2Examination of the budget surplus for the 2013–2016 budget periodDiscuté
9.3Overview of the arrears of Member States and Corresponding MembersDiscuté
9.4Report by the BIML Director on the 2017 budget forecastDiscuté
10LiaisonsDiscuté
11Countries and Economies with Emerging Metrology Systems (CEEMS)Discuté
12Revision of OIML B 6 Directives for OIML technical workDiscuté
13Development, revision and amendment of OIML Basic PublicationsDiscuté
14OIML Certification System (OIML-CS)Discuté
15Technical activitiesDiscuté
16Election by the CIML of the CIML PresidentDiscuté
17Decision by the CIML on the appointment of the new BIML Assistant DirectorDiscuté
18Decision by the CIML on the renewal of the contract of Mr. Ian DunmillDiscuté
19Presentation of OIML AwardsDiscuté
20Future meetingsDiscuté
21Other mattersDiscuté
22Review of meeting resolutionsDiscuté

OIML

Organisation Internationale de Métrologie Légale

La métrologie légale — la pratique et la science de la mesure qui touche au commerce, à la santé, à la sécurité et à l'environnement.
